differential_diagnoses: Hypersensitivity pneumonitis with severe secondary pulmonary hypertension
next_steps: Perform open lung biopsy or video-assisted thoracoscopic surgery (VATS) for tissue diagnosis if stable
Immediate evaluation for lung transplantation listing
Discontinue or carefully titrate pulmonary vasodilators due to risk of precipitation of pulmonary edema in PVOD/PCH
Genetic testing for EIF2AK4 mutation to evaluate for familial PVOD/PCH
Monitor hemodynamic status and right ventricular function with echocardiography
Initiate or optimize immunosuppressive therapy while awaiting surgical biopsy results

differential_diagnoses: Hypersensitivity pneumonitis with severe secondary pulmonary hypertension
next_steps: Discontinue or decrease dose of pulmonary vasodilators to prevent pulmonary edema
Immediate evaluation for emergency lung transplant listing
Genetic testing for biallelic EIF2AK4 mutations
Consider high-risk, image-guided biopsy or cytologic assessment to exclude PTTM, depending on hemodynamic stability
Comprehensive screening for occult malignancy, including whole-body PET/CT
Continue supportive care with diuretics and oxygen, avoiding aggressive fluid depletion to prevent exacerbating low cardiac output
